summary.original: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.
summary.zhCN: 使用 Playwright 与本地 Web 应用交互并进行测试的工具包。支持验证前端功能、调试 UI 行为、捕获浏览器截图和查看浏览器日志。

description.original: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 使用 Playwright 与本地 Web 应用交互并进行测试的工具包。支持验证前端功能、调试 UI 行为、捕获浏览器截图和查看浏览器日志。Agent-OPT 将官方技能文档适配为独立的双语 Web 技能工作室，提供章节导航、全文搜索和沙箱化源文件渲染；不会执行任何上游可执行脚本。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA 4726215301db64a0cc4d41fc3219c61f37a30f4a.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier Apache-2.0 recorded from skills/webapp-testing/LICENSE.txt. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

name.zhCN: 准备面向具体任务的 Agent 执行手册

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
description.zhCN: 根据有边界的用户目标和上下文，对已固定版本的技能章节进行相关性排序，然后在不执行上游脚本的情况下生成 Agent 提示词、检查清单或参考资料包。

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
原始 SKILL.md 保持不变；译文已逐节审校，并保留 frontmatter keys、代码块、命令、路径、链接和不可翻译的技术术语。

features: Web 应用浏览器测试任务 with two skill-specific task examples
页面、流程与测试环境 and bounded private context input
Web 应用测试包 in agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
pinned supporting-file browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
runtime activity and controlled validation feedback
dedicatedElements: Web 应用浏览器测试任务 input
页面、流程与测试环境 panel
Web 应用测试包 result view

tests.evidence: skill-webapp-testing: original and complete Chinese bodies opened through skill_open; skill_prepare returned ranked sections, prompt, and checklist; outline/search remained available.
skill-webapp-testing: the capability-specific profile objective and context ran in Chinese through skill_prepare and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-webapp-testing: empty objectives, unknown fields/sections, invalid locale, traversal, and missing supporting assets were rejected with InvocationValidationError.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-webapp-testing] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-webapp-testing; result=passed
skill-webapp-testing: source bundle hashes and containment were checked; the adapter only reads curated files and grants no network, commands, secrets, or accounts.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
